	emden_funb

	emden_sol
zeros_liker

big_fun
big_bc
ones
size)
big_sol
 Big version of sl_fun, with two parameters.
    The two differential equations represented by sl_fun are broadcast to the
    number of rows of y, rotating between the parameters p[0] and p[1].
    Here are the differential equations:
        dy[0]/dt = y[1]
        dy[1]/dt = -p[0]**2 * y[0]
        dy[2]/dt = y[3]
        dy[3]/dt = -p[1]**2 * y[2]
        dy[4]/dt = y[5]
        dy[5]/dt = -p[0]**2 * y[4]
        dy[6]/dt = y[7]
        dy[7]/dt = -p[1]**2 * y[6]
        .
        .
        .
    r
big_fun_with_parameters
ranger:
big_fun_with_parameters_jac
big_bc_with_parameters
big_bc_with_parameters_jac
big_sol_with_parameters
MbP?r
cosrG
